description_long: This sculpture features a stylized human face with pronounced, symmetrical curls or waves forming a voluminous hair or headdress. The facial features are deeply set, with a prominent brow, nose, and lips, giving the figure a solemn expression. The body is compact and abstract, with arms bent and hands resting on the torso, and the lower section flares out to form a stable base. The entire surface is highly polished, creating a glossy, reflective finish that accentuates the deep teal color. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the hair or headdress forming a rounded, smooth mass. The overall form is monolithic and solid, suggesting it is cast from a single material.
description: A glossy, deep teal sculpture of a stylized human figure with voluminous hair and a solemn face, featuring a highly polished, reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed face, symmetrical curls, and compact body with hands resting on the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the hair or headdress and the protruding arm, with less facial detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the rounded, smooth mass of the hair or headdress, with minimal detail on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm and the side profile of the face and hair.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure with voluminous hair
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
